description_long: This office building features a rectangular brick exterior with large industrial-style grid windows on two sides, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The structure is divided into multiple rooms, visible through the windows, and includes modern office furnishings such as desks, chairs, and shelving. The brickwork is consistent and uniform, giving the building a robust, utilitarian appearance typical of converted warehouse offices. One side of the building has a plain brick wall with no windows, while another side features a single metal door, likely serving as the main entrance. Decorative elements such as large wall clocks and gears are visible inside, adding a touch of industrial decor. The roof is flat, and the overall design emphasizes functionality and openness, characteristic of contemporary urban office spaces.
description: A rectangular brick office building with large industrial grid windows, flat roof, and modern interior furnishings. The design is utilitarian with industrial decor and a single metal door entrance.
description_view_0: This view shows two large grid windows on each floor, revealing the interior office layout and furnishings.
description_view_1: This side is mostly a plain brick wall with no windows, but interior partitions and decor are visible through the open roof.
description_view_2: This view highlights a single metal door entrance and a wall-mounted clock and gear decor inside, with grid windows on the opposite side.
description_view_3: This side features two large grid windows per floor, similar to view 0, but with a clearer view of the interior office arrangement.
attribute_window_pattern: Regularly spaced, large rectangular grid windows in a stacked arrangement on two sides; no windows on the other two sides.
